Flow:           1. Admin creates a market with a question and resolution deadline.           2. Anyone can buy YES/NO tokens by depositing G$ (1:1 collateral).              Each purchase mints both YES and NO tokens to a pool; caller              receives the side they want.           3. After deadline, a resolver (oracle/admin) calls resolve(YES/NO).           4. Winners redeem YES (if YES wins) or NO (if NO wins) tokens for G$.              A 1% fee is charged on winnings and routed to the UBI fee splitter.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/predict/MarketFactory.sol":"IPredictToken"},"evmVersion":"prague","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":false,"runs":200},"remappings":[":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/"]},"sources":{"src/predict/ConditionalTokens.sol":{"keccak256":"0x0ea92e0cf9bc8b234d052f1d73e537a5ec0ee64c724bd69a77c30e89238301a2","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://9b3b79b251965fabc47d4c47824e2f44481560747ff170371ae9404ec1cfd898","dweb:/ipfs/QmZvxCRZ2TT8PkYH7sibU2z9wUxafzhvY3Q2qnwgmhyR1V"]},"src/predict/MarketFactory.sol":{"keccak256":"0x7f1072fb9808e51a33678aebe5fb27305138e541e8fc6913a091e5ab33642450","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://749d4b3af084bb0e51e69ae174308bb051b1594f34897cca0836dcc340155fd7","dweb:/ipfs/QmTFiWGK7yd45wNtz6kyXYsp545Tgay5SeNQGBfgPcVahy"]}},"version":1}
